decision_reason: The required Polymarket external signal could not be established with reproducible point-in-time macro market discovery/history discipline in this pass. Current API snapshots and token price histories are reachable, but selecting markets after the fact and replaying histories would introduce ex-post selection/lookahead risk. No fabricated proxy was used.

universe.selection_rationale: Ex-ante macro/political event exposure pool across broad equity, growth, small caps, duration, credit, gold, energy, utilities, healthcare, financials/regional banks, defense/industrials, defensives, China/EM, oil, and USD sleeves. No performance-based filtering was run.

external_signal.provider: Polymarket public Gamma API and CLOB API
external_signal.observed_endpoint_behavior: Initial requests without browser User-Agent returned HTTP 403; with browser User-Agent, current snapshots and token-level price history returned JSON. This still did not establish point-in-time macro market discovery for historical backtesting.
external_signal.timestamp_lag_convention_required: Probability observation timestamp must be strictly before the ETF close used for the next rebalance; market IDs/token IDs/liquidity filters must be known as of that timestamp.

market_data.source: Alpaca real market data only if qfa evaluation is run
market_data.reason_not_run: No valid external prediction-market signal; fallback-only SHY smoke would not evaluate AR-091 hypothesis.

random_period_protocol.planned: External-signal availability check, then qfa/Alpaca primary and 6-12 random windows using only lagged prediction-market features.
random_period_protocol.reason_not_executed: Blocked before market-price evaluation due to external-signal timestamp discipline failure.

costs.reason_not_applied: No backtest metrics; issue blocked on external data.

metrics.unavailable_reason: No qfa backtest was run because the required prediction-market signal was not reproducibly available with point-in-time market selection/history discipline.

orthogonality.rationale: Conceptual driver is distinct from price-only ETF alphas, but no return stream exists for correlation/redundancy testing.

provenance.command_summary: No qfa daemon, no orders, no --data-csv. Public Polymarket endpoints were probed without secrets; no raw API payloads were retained.

divergent_child.title: treasury-options-implied-event-risk-etf-allocator
divergent_child.mechanism: Different return driver/data input/model family: broker/exchange/official option-implied Treasury-rate event risk and volatility term structure mapped to duration/gold/equity sleeves, rather than prediction-market probabilities.
